# relacy License Notes

The upstream LICENSE file is verbatim BSD-3-Clause (three conditions, including
the no-endorsement clause). The plan spec described it as "BSD-2-Clause" but the
actual upstream text has the third clause:

> The name of the owner may not be used to endorse or promote products derived
> from this software without specific prior written permission.

**Conclusion**: BSD-3-Clause. This is MORE restrictive than BSD-2-Clause only in
the no-endorsement sense. It remains fully compatible with the existing ADR 0016
license compatibility table (MIT/BSD/Apache-2.0 pre-approved). No ADR 0016
amendment is required.

Copyright: Copyright (c) 2008-2013, Dmitry S. Vyukov — preserved verbatim in
`third_party/relacy/LICENSE`.
